public_copy: PageLab public surface updates now have a repo-local, non-deploying owner review lane that packages deterministic claim-boundary, source-mapping, leakage, route-smoke, and review-surface checks before any go-live decision.
evidence_refs: Public Surface Owner Semantic Acceptance Policy

route_smoke_result.reason: This slice wires a local owner review command only; no public route or deployment is touched.

build_result.reason: No public route code or runtime app behavior was changed by the template itself.

typecheck_result.reason: The runner script is plain Node JavaScript and does not add TypeScript surface area.

lint_result.reason: This template records the lane wiring; full repo lint remains a separate validation step when public page code changes.

visual_spot_check.reason: No public visual route was changed.

public_may_claim: A local owner review command exists for PageLab public surface update packets.
The command generates a review packet and deterministic PASS/WARN/BLOCK/NOT_APPLICABLE results.
The lane is non-deploying and preserves owner go-live authority.
public_must_not_claim: Full QA, SEO, accessibility, analytics, visual regression, or autonomous orchestration was completed.
internal_only: Private locations, credentials, provider metadata, raw traces, prompt materials, and internal evidence details.
